meetings.name: Regular board meeting
meetings.description:
The regular board meeting provides a public forum for the board of directors to conduct official business, review reports from district leadership, and approve key resolutions. Community members are invited to attend and participate in the public comment period.

This recurring meeting covers standing agenda items including the superintendent's report, consent agenda, policy updates, and any action items brought forward by board committees.

meetings.name: Finance Committee — Annual Budget Review and Long-Term Capital Planning Session
meetings.description:
The finance committee meeting brings together committee members and district finance staff to review the district's financial position, monitor budget performance, and provide oversight of major expenditures. Discussions are based on current financial reports and variance analysis prepared by the finance department.

This meeting is a working session for committee members and relevant staff. Action items and recommendations from this meeting are reported to the full board for approval.

meetings.name: Audit & Risk Review: Internal Controls, Compliance Frameworks, and Emerging Risk Factors
meetings.description:
The audit and risk committee meets to oversee the district's internal audit program, review findings from internal and external auditors, and monitor the status of the risk register. The committee ensures that controls are operating effectively and that significant risks are being actively managed.

This meeting includes updates from the internal audit team, discussion of any emerging compliance issues, and follow-up on outstanding audit recommendations from prior periods.

meetings.name: Regular board meeting
meetings.description:
The June regular board meeting is an open public session for the full board of directors to conduct official business, hear reports from district leadership, and act on items brought forward from standing committees.

The agenda will include the superintendent's monthly report, approval of the consent agenda, second readings of any pending policy revisions, and updates on the district's strategic plan initiatives. Community members are encouraged to attend and may address the board during the designated public comment period at the start of the meeting.

Meeting materials, including the full agenda and supporting documents, will be posted to the district website at least 72 hours before the meeting date.

meetings.name: Finance committee meeting
meetings.description:
This working session of the finance committee will focus on reviewing the district's year-end financial outlook, including a detailed variance analysis comparing actuals to the adopted budget across all major fund categories.

The committee will also review preliminary assumptions for the FY2027 budget cycle, including updated enrollment projections, labor cost estimates, and anticipated changes to state funding formulas. Staff will present a summary of capital project expenditures and an updated cash flow forecast through the fiscal year close.

This is an internal meeting for committee members and invited finance department staff. Recommendations and action items will be brought to the full board at the June regular meeting.

meetings.name: Audit committee meeting
meetings.description:
The June audit committee meeting will include a year-end review of the internal audit work plan, a status update on all open audit findings and management responses, and a preliminary discussion of the scope for the upcoming external audit engagement.

The committee will also review the district's updated risk register, with particular attention to areas flagged during the prior quarter — including cybersecurity controls, procurement compliance, and third-party contract monitoring. The internal audit team will present a self-assessment of audit quality and independence for the period.

External auditors may be present for a portion of the meeting to discuss the planned audit approach and timeline. This is a closed session for committee members, internal audit staff, and invited guests only.

templates.name: Special session
templates.description:
A special session is convened to address urgent or time-sensitive matters that cannot wait for the next regularly scheduled board meeting. The agenda is focused and limited to the specific items for which the session was called.

Notice of a special session is provided in accordance with district policy and open meeting requirements. Only items listed in the meeting notice may be acted upon during a special session.
